content: COURT: The charge sheet has been filed. Accused appear. Defence counsel requests bail. CBI opposes. CBI Counsel: 'Accused are flight risks. Evidence shows offshore fund transfers. One accused attempted to flee to Dubai on October 28.' Arjun Mehta’s counsel: 'My client is a respected entrepreneur. He has deep roots in Navi Mumbai. The evidence is circumstantial.' Priya Mehta’s counsel: 'My client was a victim of identity theft.' Dr. Kulkarni’s counsel: 'My client was coerced and threatened.' Rajiv Desai’s counsel: 'He was acting under duress.' JUDGE: 'The fraud involved deliberate forgery, bribery, and money laundering on a massive scale. The accused have shown no remorse. Bail is denied. All accused remanded in judicial custody until trial. Next hearing: December 15, 2023. Court adjourned.'
